# 🐠 CoralGuard Design System
## Generated by UI/UX Pro Max for Marine Conservation

---

## 🎨 COLOR PALETTE

### Primary Ocean Theme
```css
/* Deep Ocean */
--ocean-900: #0c4a6e;  /* Primary background base */
--ocean-800: #075985;
--ocean-700: #0369a1;
--ocean-600: #0284c7;
--ocean-500: #0ea5e9;  /* Primary accent */
--ocean-400: #38bdf8;
--ocean-300: #7dd3fc;

/* Coral Accents */
--coral-600: #e63946;  /* CTA buttons */
--coral-500: #ff4757;  /* Primary coral */
--coral-400: #ff6b6b;
--coral-300: #ff9e9e;

/* Reef Greens */
--reef-600: #16a34a;
--reef-500: #22c55e;   /* Success/healthy */
--reef-400: #4ade80;
--reef-300: #86efac;

/* Supporting */
--sand-100: #f5f5dc;   /* Light backgrounds */
--foam-50: #f0f9ff;    /* Cards */
```

### Semantic Colors
| Purpose | Color | Hex |
|---------|-------|-----|
| Primary | Ocean Blue | #0ea5e9 |
| Secondary | Deep Ocean | #0369a1 |
| Accent/Coral | Coral Red | #ff4757 |
| Success | Reef Green | #22c55e |
| Warning | Warm Amber | #f59e0b |
| Critical | Alert Red | #dc2626 |
| Background | Deep Ocean | #0c4a6e |
| Surface | Glass White | rgba(255,255,255,0.1) |
| Text Primary | White | #ffffff |
| Text Secondary | White 60% | rgba(255,255,255,0.6) |

## 📝 TYPOGRAPHY

### Font Stack
```css
/* Headings - Modern geometric */
font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;

/* Body - Clean readable */
font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
```

### Type Scale
| Element | Size | Weight | Line Height |
|---------|------|--------|-------------|
| H1 Hero | clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem) | 700 | 1.1 |
| H2 Section | 2.5rem / 40px | 700 | 1.2 |
| H3 Card | 1.5rem / 24px | 600 | 1.3 |
| Body Large | 1.25rem / 20px | 400 | 1.6 |
| Body | 1rem / 16px | 400 | 1.6 |
| Small | 0.875rem / 14px | 500 | 1.5 |
| Caption | 0.75rem / 12px | 500 | 1.4 |

---

## 🎯 STYLE PATTERN: Organic Biophilic + Ocean Depth

### Keywords
- Nature-inspired, fluid, organic curves
- Ocean gradients, bioluminescent accents
- Glassmorphism, depth layers
- Breathing animations, wave motion
- Marine life aesthetic

### Border Radius
```css
--radius-sm: 8px;
--radius-md: 12px;
--radius-lg: 16px;
--radius-xl: 24px;
--radius-2xl: 32px;
--radius-full: 9999px;
```

### Shadows (Glass Effect)
```css
--shadow-glass: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
--shadow-glow-coral: 0 0 40px rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.3);
--shadow-glow-ocean: 0 0 40px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.3);
```

---

## ✨ EFFECTS & ANIMATIONS

### Key Animations
```css
/* Wave Background */
@keyframes wave {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
}

/* Bubble Rise */
@keyframes rise {
  0% { bottom: -100px; transform: translateX(0) scale(1); opacity: 0; }
  10% { opacity: 1; }
  90% { opacity: 0.5; }
  100% { bottom: 100vh; transform: translateX(100px) scale(0.5); opacity: 0; }
}

/* Pulse Glow */
@keyframes pulse-glow {
  0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.5); }
  50% { box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.8); }
}

/* Gradient Flow */
@keyframes gradient-flow {
  0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
  50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
  100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
}
```

### Transitions
```css
--transition-fast: 150ms ease;
--transition-normal: 300ms ease;
--transition-slow: 500ms ease;
```

---

## 🧩 COMPONENTS

### Glass Card
```css
.glass-card {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  border-radius: 24px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
}
```

### Ocean Card (Darker)
```css
.ocean-card {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(7, 89, 133, 0.8), rgba(12, 74, 110, 0.9));
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  border-radius: 24px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.3);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
}
```

### Coral Button (CTA)
```css
.coral-button {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b, #ff4757);
  color: white;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 12px 24px;
  font-weight: 600;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(255, 71, 87, 0.3);
  transition: all 300ms ease;
}
.coral-button:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(255, 71, 87, 0.5);
}
```

### Reef Button (Secondary)
```css
.reef-button {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4ade80, #22c55e);
  color: white;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 12px 24px;
  font-weight: 600;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.3);
}
```

## 📱 RESPONSIVE BREAKPOINTS

```css
--mobile: 375px;
--tablet: 768px;
--desktop: 1024px;
--wide: 1440px;
```

## ♿ ACCESSIBILITY CHECKLIST

- [ ] Color contrast 4.5:1 minimum for text
- [ ] Focus states visible on all interactive elements
- [ ] prefers-reduced-motion respected
- [ ] Semantic HTML structure
- [ ] Alt text for images
- [ ] Keyboard navigation support

---

## 🎭 BRAND VOICE

### Tone
- **Hopeful but urgent** - The ocean needs help, but we can make a difference
- **Scientific but accessible** - Data-driven but understandable
- **Community-focused** - "Together, we can save our oceans"
- **Trustworthy** - Transparent blockchain verification

### Key Phrases
- "Protect Our Blue Planet"
- "AI + Blockchain for Ocean Conservation"
- "Join the decentralized network for ocean conservation"
- "Real-time reef monitoring"
- "Earn rewards for conservation actions"

---

## 🖼️ VISUAL ASSETS NEEDED

### Icons (Lucide)
- Waves (logo/brand)
- Droplets (water/moisture)
- Thermometer (temperature)
- Activity (health)
- MapPin (location)
- Shield (protection)
- Heart (conservation)
- Trophy (rewards)
- Fish (marine life)

### Images
- Hero: Underwater coral reef (vibrant)
- NFT Cards: AI-generated marine artwork
- Dashboard: Data visualization backgrounds
